title: I would like to see a MAP tab added to the Item Page when opened
excerpt:
I would like to see a MAP tab added to my item page for BOTH desktop and MOBILE. 
When I open up the item page I see Updates, Activity Log, Overview - but a MAP tab where I could see the location of my item here would be…

posts.author: dwadsworth (Dustin Wadsworth)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to see a MAP tab added to my item page for BOTH desktop and MOBILE.

When I open up the item page I see Updates, Activity Log, Overview - but a MAP tab where I could see the location of my item here would be great!

A new widget could work but an actual tab that works in the Mobile App would be a great feature.

Map-Tab-Idea1822×538 78.4 KB

posts.author: loovanloon (Ton)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yes Please add this!
@dwadsworth Did you already vote on this for yourself?

posts.author: rosaly (Rose @ Sayn)
posts.cookedHtml: I think they now offer an Item Card view. Where it shows all the information on the item. Unless you mean like a literal map (location )

posts.author: MCautreels (Maarten Cautreels - Tryve)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

Using our Map Picker in Location Toolkit you could achieve this on desktop (at the moment, monday doesn’t support 3rd party app vendors to add content to the mobile app).

While the initial use for the Map Picker is to allow to select a location on a map and save it to a Location column it’ll also display an already set location on the map:

Screenshot 2024-06-25 at 22.56.591920×1100 224 KB

Best,

Maarten
